result:
All 30 tests pass. The implementation added the following V2 commands to the existing Go project:

- **`status`** — lists staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file sets between two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to a commit without touching working directory files
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent
